subject: Underground mine tunnel interior with wooden support beams, rail tracks, and a warm glow at the tunnel's end
description: The image depicts the interior of an underground mine tunnel viewed from a first-person perspective looking inward. Wooden support beams frame the rough stone walls and ceiling on both sides of the passage. Metal rail tracks run along the dirt floor toward a warmly lit tunnel opening in the background, creating a strong sense of depth and linear perspective. The ambient lighting is dim and cave-like, with the distant glow providing the primary light source. The setting conveys isolation, physical labor, and the weight of underground spaces. No figures or creatures are present.
foreground: rail tracks and wooden support beam framing on stone floor and walls
background: receding tunnel with warm amber glow at far end
